subject: It’s time to call in a doctor.

body:
Rep. Valadao will stop at nothing to rip away healthcare!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130285620/617243484/981257658?refcode=header-img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgzNjIwMzktOTU0Mi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UaDZn9PqgrH4VoSvF_i6NOPA-l-0g9GoxggVYsOxFOI=)
---
Team —

Rep. Valadao will stop at __nothing__ to rip away healthcare from Central Valley residents.

That’s why, it’s time to call in a doctor for CA-22. | [ELECT DR. BAINS FOR CA-22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130285621/617243487/-1252702269?amount=10&refcode=JBFC_20260427_EMDF_E1_T0_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgzNjIwMzktOTU0Mi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UaDZn9PqgrH4VoSvF_i6NOPA-l-0g9GoxggVYsOxFOI=)
---
Valadao’s record shows that when given the opportunity, **_he’ll choose to score political points with his party instead of protecting the healthcare of his constituents._**

He voted to gut health coverage for **THOUSANDS** of people in CA-22 and cut billions of funding for California’s health care system — forcing clinic closures in an area where families already face shortages in care.

As a family care doctor in rural California, Dr. Bains sees the impact of these reckless policies in her clinic, and **that’s why she’s running for Congress to protect and expand healthcare access.**

[Dr. Bains will never sell out the health and wellbeing of our community. Will you chip in today to elect a doctor to represent CA-22?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130285623/617243489/-1252702269?amount=10&refcode=JBFC_20260427_EMDF_E1_T0_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgzNjIwMzktOTU0Mi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UaDZn9PqgrH4VoSvF_i6NOPA-l-0g9GoxggVYsOxFOI=)

name: Voter Action Project NC
subject: A typical stealth voter suppression tactic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Every suppressive action these vengeful partisans take shows their true colors. For all their talk about election integrity, voter ID, and not harming eligible voters, closing legitimate polling places to make it harder to vote only has one logical end result.
Attacks by opponents of voting rights on young voters, mail-in ballots, early voting, and more aren't about integrity and fairness. It's about protecting their own power at any cost and tilting the playing field before the game has even been played.
We must stand up to stop them at every turn. RUSH $35 or more today to help us fight back in North Carolina and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042726_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NC Newsline: Amid protests, NC elections board rejects campus voting sites and Sunday voting in several counties [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042726_3&amount=25]
We're now facing the repercussions of the partisan election takeover laws that went into effect at the end of 2024, Team.
To refresh your memory: After the 2024 elections and the defeat of a MAGA candidate for governor, opponents of voting rights in North Carolina jammed through a bill that took the power of the governor to appoint people to election boards and handed that to the state auditor . It's worth noting that the state auditor is the only statewide elected Republican, with Democrats winning the 2024 races for governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, and secretary of state.
Now, among massive protests from young voters, the MAGA-fied North Carolina State Elections Board recently shot down proposals to continue having early voting sites on several universities around the state . These weren't new sites either; these were places where North Carolina had provided early voting locations for a decade or more.
This is voter suppression, plain and simple, by making it harder for eligible, registered voters to vote in-person by taking away their polling place. It's another demonstration of how opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections.
We have to fight these suppressive actions in North Carolina and any other state where opponents of voting rights try to replicate this. Step up with $35 or whatever you can today to help every eligible voter cast their ballot >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042726_3&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042726_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042726_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042726_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042726_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042726_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042726_3&amount=35]
These new, highly partisan State Election Board members wouldn't even look the protestors in the eye or engage with their proposals. After the vote, Chairman Francis De Luca threatened to call the cops on students if they didn’t leave.
Need to better understand how this impacts young voters? Western Carolina University in Jackson County, for example, has had a polling place on campus since 2016 that’s been used in five general elections and four primaries, according to a document prepared for the board. The state board voted 3-2 to get rid of it.
Closing the campus voting site would not save money, but “ would create barriers to voting for young, rural residents ,” Jackson County Board member Betsy Swift told the state board. 64% of students don’t have vehicles to drive to the polling place, she said.
Without the on-campus site, the closest polling place for students will be a recreation center nearly two miles away. Students without transportation will have to walk along a four-lane highway and through a meadow to get there.
Voter suppression isn't just black and white photos of eligible voters being turned away from polling places. Voter suppression is making it harder for eligible voters to take part in our elections through onerous ID requirements, closing polling places, taking away voting locations, or ending mail-in voting. Every time someone makes it harder to cast your ballot, voters are suppressed.
It's not going to end until we stop them.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop attacking our fundamental right to vote until we stop them at the ballot box and take away their power. Chip in $35 or whatever you can today to help fight back nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042726_3&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042726_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042726_3&amount=20]

_**We have the opportunity to elect a true climate champion to the Oregon State Senate this May, but it’s going to be close.**_
Tonia Moro is an attorney and activist who led the successful fight to stop the Jordan Cove LNG export project in southern Oregon. She’s taken on the fossil fuel industry and won. And in the State Senate, she’ll fight to make polluters pay for the fires, floods, and climate damage impacting Oregon communities.
The winner of the Democratic primary on May 19 will almost certainly become the next State Senator for District 3, and we expect this race to come down to a very slim margin.
_A few more conversations with voters could make the difference._

\- JanePAC Volunteers

Friend, Our elections are in serious jeopardy. The SAVE Act is vital to the sanctity of our future elections. We all remember the insanity of the 2020 election in Michigan:
* The late-night ballot drops.
* The blacked-out windows in Detroit vote-counting rooms.
* Qualified Republican poll watchers denied entry—left standing out in the cold.

**Michigan is Ground Zero for election reform efforts.** But there’s a massive obstacle standing in the way. Democrat Jocelyn Benson is running for Governor. **As Secretary of State, Jocelyn Benson oversaw the chaos and confusion.**
* She pushed same-day voter registration and unrestricted absentee voting.
* She mailed out 7.7 million unsolicited absentee ballot applications.
* She even instructed election workers to “presume” signatures were valid—without meaningful verification.

If we want **_TRUE_** election reform, Michigan needs a governor willing to act. And something tells me Jocelyn Benson won’t be overturning her own failed policies. As Governor, I will make election security a top priority so Michigan can have honest, fair elections again. [**Will you stand with me to support the SAVE Act and SAVE our elections?**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=0be512bdd1c34e9498bd7c20e2e2cecf&_e=4hWigQ8oMsYxX822DWZwpN42AY2fsKjb1wT0-qxZ8r4HUma1Q480MiLRxmXfWXKil4L97TYDgdVPsI9mlXAxHCcP-KFzm0frICXgMQy7dUOluDHAvx8WHyAURagDTOUHSIqa_vS7eg-F2OfU6LPP6zHur7vE1rZunUXrQ7cBtqAM-JeTCkLOsc5ZOf_r7CQK5Yx-RRMoMR-bbUHoJy8XQCqugjPXg8KtO2zMmzv5qMYnxqOpKHE-Up-G_he45JKvjDyxMg31pphFGRXjsqGPpMVwL5h101pKyBnGKbvFE-BH5-xYp7bjQTp-_xYLPDuAO27JhwwvAoOpsTD_PJbmHeNHyvyekr-G2GfgSfmoA-hbjeO1liWOGxbyGPDxGQTuwhuxjuP5q0n-qH7lJzADrOiKU7okVneVP4lnOAzdSH8%3D)

clean_body: | | | Friend, Our elections are in serious jeopardy. The SAVE Act is vital to the sanctity of our future elections. We all remember the insanity of the 2020 election in Michigan: The late-night ballot drops. The blacked-out windows in Detroit vote-counting rooms. Qualified Republican poll watchers denied entry—left standing out in the cold. Michigan is Ground Zero for election reform efforts. But there’s a massive obstacle standing in the way. Democrat Jocelyn Benson is running for Governor. As Secretary of State, Jocelyn Benson oversaw the chaos and confusion. She pushed same-day voter registration and unrestricted absentee voting. She mailed out 7.7 million unsolicited absentee ballot applications. She even instructed election workers to “presume” signatures were valid—without meaningful verification. If we want TRUE election reform, Michigan needs a governor willing to act. And something tells me Jocelyn Benson won’t be overturning her own failed policies. As Governor, I will make election security a top priority so Michigan can have honest, fair elections again. I am the ONLY Republican who can beat Jocelyn Benson and deliver REAL reform in one of the most critical swing states in America. Thank you,John James Message from John James: This race is neck-and-neck. Gretchen Whitmer and Democrats have had their grip on America's TOP battleground state for too long. This race is critical to President Trump and Republicans. I will always fight for our shared conservative values. Help me FLIP Michigan RED! | | Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312 | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for MI Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Republicans want to throw out your vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Peter ,
Republicans are not waiting until November to try to win the midterms.
They are already in court, in state legislatures, and in election offices, trying to change how people vote, when ballots count, and who they can catch up in the confusion.
One case now before the Supreme Court could invalidate ballots mailed on time but received after Election Day due to postal delays. Other fights could make voter registration harder, limit vote-by-mail access, and force election officials to explain brand-new rules to millions of voters right before the midterms.
Republicans LOVE this, because chaos lowers turnout.
Last-minute rule changes make it easier for people to miss deadlines, show up at the wrong place, or assume their vote will not count, and in the races that decide the House majority, that is enough to change the outcome.
That is why our work is so urgent. We focus on the voters who can decide close elections but are too often ignored until the final days. We contact them early, repeatedly, and clearly so they know exactly how, when, and where to vote.
Republicans are investing in making voting harder so they can cling to power.
We have to invest in making sure voters are not left to figure it out alone. Chip in now to help GOTV PAC reach the voters who will decide whether Democrats take back the House in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em04272026]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em04272026] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em04272026]

Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em04272026]
This is how we fight back: voter by voter, district by district, until we have the majority we need.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: I will ALWAYS stand with our Law Enforcement and First Responders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=2bc7be9648&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| | | | | | Team Mackenzie,Last week, one of my far-left opponents, Bob Brooks, who is proudly endorsed by Bernie Sanders, apologized for previously being pro-police. Unfortunately, this reflects a broader trend on the far left, where caving to anti-police radicals has become commonplace.Instead of standing firmly with the men and women who protect our communities,**Brooks appears more focused on delivering for Bernie Sanders and the radical far-left than delivering for those who serve and defend us every day.**
---
[|
---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=2013a3d685&e=5ccada9200)
| |
While my opponent feels the need to apologize for his past support of law enforcement, I stand proudly with our police—and I will never apologize for it.I want to share some of the ways I have supported our brave men and women in uniform as our campaign proudly launches our First Responder coalition. **Over $5,000,000 in Funding Secured for PA-07 First Responders:**
* Carbon County Sheriff’s Office Equipment and Technology Upgrade
* Bethlehem Police Department Equipment and Technology Upgrade
* Alburtis Fire Station Upgrade
* Eastern Pennsylvania Regional Radio Network
* Northampton Borough Police Department Radio Upgrades
* Palmer Township Radio Upgrades

**Supporting Legislation to help our First Responders:**

* [ H.Res](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=b40b9db46c&e=5ccada9200)[.9](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=c5ff750023&e=5ccada9200)[84](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=1498a4bbd4&e=5ccada9200) — Supporting the recognition of January 9, 2026, as "National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day".
* [H.R.3304](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=cd4c5608a0&e=5ccada9200) — Providing Child Care for Police Officers Act of 2025
* [H.R.1551](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=056b520da7&e=5ccada9200) — Protect and Serve Act of 2025
* [H.R.309](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=558e8a3114&e=5ccada9200) — National Law Enforcement Officers Remembrance, Support and Community Outreach Act.
* [H.R.621](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=5da8499768&e=5ccada9200) — Protecting First Responders from Secondary Exposure Act of 2025
* [H.R.1269](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=e4765329cd&e=5ccada9200) — Honoring Our Fallen Heroes Act of 2025
* [H.R.1410](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=e4a8ccde3f&e=5ccada9200) — 9/11 Responder and Survivor Health Funding Correction Act of 2025
* [H.R.3497](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=48ad1661ac&e=5ccada9200) — Medal of Sacrifice Act
* [H.R.7033](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=31109c7750&e=5ccada9200) — Federal Correctional Officer Paycheck Protection Act of 2026

---
|
---
| |

**We’re proudly launching the First Responders for Mackenzie coalition:**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=39817fa1e9&e=5ccada9200)
| |

We’re proud to announce the launch of our first responders for Mackenzie coalition. Throughout my time representing our communities, I have worked unapologetically to support local first responders.

As your Congressman, I’ll continue to put the men and women who keep us safe ahead of politics — honoring heroes by creating the Keystone First Responder Award and bringing resources back to our community to build fire stations, purchase equipment, and upgrade communications technology.
If you would like to join this growing list of outstanding local first responders, please click [here](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=710af2ecfb&e=5ccada9200)
Sincerely,
Ryan Mackenzie

name: SDC HQ
subject: Let this sink in for a moment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
This poll isn’t from MSNBC. It’s from Fox News. And it's SHOCKING.
#
Let this sink in for a moment: **A recent Fox News poll shows Democrats leading Republicans 52% to 46% on the generic congressional ballot heading into 2026.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103209?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2)
**[BUILD ON THIS MOMENTUM: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103209?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2)**
This information tracks with everything else we’ve been seeing lately: Sinking approval polling for Donald Trump. An unpopular overseas war. Rising costs. Deep dissatisfaction among everyday Americans about the GOP’s failure to actually serve them. The list goes on.
But this poll isn’t from MSNBC. _It’s from Fox News._
And it gets better. The 52% Democratic support is the highest number Fox News has ever recorded for either party – going all the way back to when they started asking the question.
**Our momentum is real. The polling is as good as it's been in years.**
But here's the thing about momentum: It doesn't pay for TV ads. It doesn't fund organizers. It doesn't win elections on its own.
**Democrats need resources to flip seats across the country.**
_If even Fox News is showing us ahead, imagine what we can do when we work together to support Democrats running in the most competitive races happening this year._ That’s why we’re asking for your help today:
**[Can you chip in $15 today to help us support Democrats running in key races across the country in 2026? Democrats have got real data and momentum on our side, but we’re up against GOP mega-donors and billionaire elites propping up the Republicans this cycle, so Democrats need grassroots supporters like you to step up as soon as you can.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103209?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103210?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103210?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103210?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103210?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103210?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103210?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103209?refcode=em20260427-10359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10359%2E614464%2EXuypO2)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: What’s at stake in Georgia

Hey Peter, it’s Jon Ossoff. Before you close this email, I need you to hear this: Senate Republicans’ leading Super PAC just announced their $342 million plan to defend their Senate majority — and that plan includes spending $44 million against me here in Georgia. _Their largest-ever Georgia investment outside a runoff._ _Not good._ I wasn’t exaggerating when I said this Senate race will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation. Peter, I need you with me. The stakes couldn’t be higher. Will you donate $10 to my reelection campaign to help respond to these attacks and win here in Georgia? **Chip in to my reelection campaign and the Georgia Democratic Party here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dpg-em-fr-apr26-ossoff](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130286164/617253570/-1335064370?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_042726_B1_OSSOFFSPLIT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjkwMDU4Yy05NzQyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmgFUB6pGLWvhjZTEuZPcRW4jYqE4WT05lJ6t3KIjXY=)** Georgia is the tipping point state in the midterms. If Senate Republicans can elect a Trump loyalist in Georgia, they don’t just expand their majority in the Senate — they lock it in for the long-run. With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. That’s what’s at stake in Georgia. That’s why they’re pouring $44 million into this race. It’s why Republicans will likely spend hundreds of millions more before Election Day. And that’s why we have to fight back — _and quickly._ So, I’m asking: [Please, consider making a contribution to my reelection and the Georgia Democratic Party today. Every donation counts in a race as close as this one will be.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130286165/617253571/-1335064370?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_042726_B1_OSSOFFSPLIT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjkwMDU4Yy05NzQyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmgFUB6pGLWvhjZTEuZPcRW4jYqE4WT05lJ6t3KIjXY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Roy Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: Not asking for money, just your opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
re: my priorities survey
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1207%2E124072%2EZUTL6Y)
| | | |
---
Peter,
While my MAGA opponent is backed by far-right super PACs and the GOP establishment, I’m building a grassroots movement powered by folks like you and your interests, concerns and hopes for the future.
**That’s why I need to hear from you directly. This race is picking up steam, and your input is critical to making sure we flip North Carolina and the Senate blue.[Will you take my priorities survey and let me know what issues matter most to you in this election?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9976?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=8&akid=1207%2E124072%2EZUTL6Y)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9976?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=9&akid=1207%2E124072%2EZUTL6Y)
---
With experts at Politico saying that Democrats have no chance to take back the Senate without winning in North Carolina, this is the most important race in the country.
I’m the biggest threat to the GOP’s hold on power, so President Trump and Republicans are going all in to defeat me. **Now, a recent poll shows this race statistically tied.**
The only way I can fight back and flip this seat blue is with an airtight campaign strategy shaped by people like you. **[Before the end of the day, will you take just one minute to sh are your thoughts with me?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9976?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=10&akid=1207%2E124072%2EZUTL6Y)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9976?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=11&akid=1207%2E124072%2EZUTL6Y)
---
Thank you for adding your voice.

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1207%2E124072%2EZUTL6Y)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1207%2E124072%2EZUTL6Y)_**

Sorry to bother you, but I wouldn’t be sending this if it wasn’t important.

I'm sorry to bother you, but I wouldn’t be sending this if it wasn’t important. I just got off the phone with my finance director, and she let me know that we’re still $5,423 short of our end-of-month fundraising goal. With Republicans desperate to flip my seat, hitting this goal is crucial to prove that this people-powered team has what it takes to defend OR-05 and do our part to take back the House. So I wanted to reach out personally to ask for your help. I know you know how much is at stake, so I’ll just say this: It would mean the world to me if you could pitch in a few extra dollars today. Here’s the best link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynum-email-2026](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130286372/617267243/-2128870824?refcode=email_042726_before-midnight-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3MmZlZDAtOWE0Mi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sDjXJueFrCFNgSdalKR_gvSB_JCCzNtzhY7OCbC71VA=)** Thanks so much for always having my back! _– Janelle_

clean_body: Sorry to bother you, but I wouldn’t be sending this if it wasn’t important. I'm sorry to bother you, but I wouldn’t be sending this if it wasn’t important. body:
House Majority PAC is the only organization solely focused on defeating Republicans and reclaiming our Majority. We’d hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can click here. James Carville [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91305/images/unnamed%20%2816%29.png]

It’s James Carville.

1 dollar.

That’s the donation I’m asking you to make before midnight. No, that’s not a typo – just $1.

$1 to RUIN Trump’s second term in office.

$1 to BEAT BACK against his attempts to shut down ActBlue and ban mail-in voting.

$1 to DEFEND our incredible Democrats in the closest battleground districts.

$1 to PROVE that our Blue Wave wasn’t a fluke and Democrats are fired up!

$1 to send Trump and Johnson a RESOUNDING message that their days in power are numbered.

I know it doesn’t seem like $1 can do all these things.

But if we all give, it adds up – and we’ll be unstoppable.

So, please: Can I count on you to contribute just $1 to House Majority PAC? If you – and everyone else reading this – chip in before midnight, we can hold Republicans ACCOUNTABLE for their attacks on our Democracy, rush resources to critical districts, and kick House Republicans OUT of power in the midterms. Will you please join 5,000 grassroots supporters and chip in before the upcoming fundraising deadline? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-2026]

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: New York Times: "People are going silent"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.electjon.com/go/4589?t=1&akid=2186%2E5691347%2EcqaATi)

Peter,
Before I ran for the U.S. Senate, I was an investigative journalist leading a team that exposed corruption and human rights abuses worldwide.
This report in _The New York Times_ reminded me of what I saw in many of those investigations:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260427-2-f&t=2&akid=2186%2E5691347%2EcqaATi)
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminds me of countries where dissent is silenced by intimidation.
From the article:
_Fired federal workers who are worried about losing their homes ask not to be quoted by name. University presidents fearing that millions of dollars in federal funding could disappear are holding their fire. Chief executives alarmed by tariffs that could hurt their businesses are on mute. ..._
_“When you see important societal actors — be it university presidents, media outlets, C.E.O.s, mayors, governors — changing their behavior in order to avoid the wrath of the government, that’s a sign that we’ve crossed the line into some form of authoritarianism,” said Steven Levitsky, a professor of government at Harvard and the co-author of the influential 2018 book “How Democracies Die.”_
**This is unacceptable in the United States of America.**
Peter — As Trump dismantles checks on his power and purges the government to fill every office with loyalists, more and more Americans are too afraid of retaliation to speak up.
**This descent into an un-American America must be stopped. We must regain Congressional power.**
I’m the ONLY Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.
That means I’m MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
**Help me beat them again, just like we did in 2021.**
[**Please contribute to my campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260427-2-f&t=3&akid=2186%2E5691347%2EcqaATi)
Thank you for chipping in if you can.
\- Jon
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260427-2-f&t=4&akid=2186%2E5691347%2EcqaATi)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=2186%2E5691347%2EcqaATi) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2186%2E5691347%2EcqaATi) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: AOC
subject: A foolish mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
These priorities are actually not partisan at all.
#
Republicans are making a foolish mistake by saying they think that making investments in housing and energy are so-called 'Democrat priorities.'
Cutting the EPA as a 'Democrat priority.' Do you know what this country looked like before the EPA?
Rivers in rural areas were _on fire_ because of corporations poisoning the people who lived in those areas. Poor, middle-class communities getting poisoned and dumped on by corporations — like DuPont and 3M — pouring chemicals into these places.
Well, you know what?
**You're damn well right that it's a Democratic priority to keep people from getting poisoned** by identifying dangerous chemicals that are being dumped and causing cancer in people without their knowledge.
**You're damn right that it's a Democratic priority to bring down the cost of housing** , and mortgages, and rent.
**And you're damn right that it's a Democratic priority to raise the minimum wage in this country** to allow people to get a fair shot at the American dream.
If they want to say that's a 'Democratic priority' — they're right.
But it's important for us to remember that _these priorities are actually not partisan at all_.
They think they're hurting Democrats — but what they are doing is choosing to hurt _Americans_.
We cannot allow it. Our movement will have to push back harder than ever.
[Stand with us in the fight by making a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260427-2.ksAlU6&refcode=em20260427-11278-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260427-2.ksAlU6&refcode=em20260427-11278-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20260427-2?refcode=em20260427-11278-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=11278_2526796_o-Fgga&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20260427-11278-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=11278%2E2526796%2Eo-Fgga)
---|---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Hi Friend, it's Dylan, Deb’s campaign manager.
With the primary quickly approaching on June 2, I wanted to share an inside look at the state of Deb's race in New Mexico with some of Deb’s top grassroots supporters.
**_[But before you read my full memo below, will you please rush $5 or more to help reach our $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&t=2&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&t=3&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)
---
**Deb for New Mexico Campaign Strategy Memo
April 27, 2026**

| | _STATE OF THE RACE:_****_**The primary is just weeks away, our MAGA-funded Democratic opponent is doubling down on attacks, Republicans are ready to spend millions to flip New Mexico.**_
---
* Fox News has called our race a TOP pickup opportunity for Republicans, which means they will do whatever it takes to flip New Mexico.

* Self-funding Republican opponents and a MAGA-funded Democratic opponent are all vying for this seat, relying on gifts from the same donors who elected Trump.

* Attack ads are flooding the airwaves filled with lies and misinformation — they're trying to drown us out because they know Deb is the best leader for New Mexico.

---
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&t=4&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)
---
| | **_WHO DEB IS:_** _**Deb's running a different kind of campaign, built on grassroots support and momentum.**_
---
* Unlike her opponents, Deb doesn't come from wealth, and she's not backed by billionaires — this grassroots campaign is powered by the people.

* Since launching this campaign, she's built a movement with over 300,000 individual donations.

* Deb has stood alongside workers fighting for better wages, joined picket lines, listened to people struggling with healthcare, affordability, safety in their communities, and more.

* She is a tested leader who has stood up to Trump and his extremist allies before — and is ready to do it again. As Governor, she will stand up to ICE overreach, defend civil rights, safeguard public spaces, and protect New Mexicans so families can live without fear.

---
**But she can’t do it alone.**
---
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&t=5&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)
---
| | **_HOW CAN YOU HELP?_** **_This is where you come in._**
---
* A grassroots campaign like this one relies on everyday people like you chipping in what you can, when you can — **_[$5 here](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&amount=5&t=6&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)_** , **_[$10 there.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&amount=10&t=7&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)_** **That's how Deb is going to raise the resources she needs to keep New Mexico blue.**

* With the primary right around the corner, reaching every goal is especially important. And we know this will be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country.

* We have an ambitious $50K end-of-month goal to ensure Deb can fight back against her self-funding opponents' attacks, get ads on the air in critical markets, and continue traveling across the state connecting with voters.

---
**_[Can we count on your support right now to help us get there and make sure Deb has the resources she needs to keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&t=8&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)_**
---
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7926?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&t=9&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)
---
I know it means the world to Deb to have you on our team, and we are all so, so proud of the movement we are building together — **thank you**.
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8111?refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&t=10&akid=9259%2E400544%2ElRzk_p)

---

clean_body: | | | Hi Friend, it's Dylan, Deb’s campaign manager. With the primary quickly approaching on June 2, I wanted to share an inside look at the state of Deb's race in New Mexico with some of Deb’s top grassroots supporters. | | Deb for New Mexico Campaign Strategy Memo April 27, 2026 | | STATE OF THE RACE:**The primary is just weeks away, our MAGA-funded Democratic opponent is doubling down on attacks, Republicans are ready to spend millions to flip New Mexico. Fox News has called our race a TOP pickup opportunity for Republicans, which means they will do whatever it takes to flip New Mexico. Self-funding Republican opponents and a MAGA-funded Democratic opponent are all vying for this seat, relying on gifts from the same donors who elected Trump. Attack ads are flooding the airwaves filled with lies and misinformation — they're trying to drown us out because they know Deb is the best leader for New Mexico. | | | | WHO DEB IS: Deb's running a different kind of campaign, built on grassroots support and momentum. Unlike her opponents, Deb doesn't come from wealth, and she's not backed by billionaires — this grassroots campaign is powered by the people. Since launching this campaign, she's built a movement with over 300,000 individual donations. Deb has stood alongside workers fighting for better wages, joined picket lines, listened to people struggling with healthcare, affordability, safety in their communities, and more. She is a tested leader who has stood up to Trump and his extremist allies before — and is ready to do it again. As Governor, she will stand up to ICE overreach, defend civil rights, safeguard public spaces, and protect New Mexicans so families can live without fear. But she can’t do it alone. | | | | HOW CAN YOU HELP? This is where you come in. A grassroots campaign like this one relies on everyday people like you chipping in what you can, when you can — , That's how Deb is going to raise the resources she needs to keep New Mexico blue. With the primary right around the corner, reaching every goal is especially important. And we know this will be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country. We have an ambitious $50K end-of-month goal to ensure Deb can fight back against her self-funding opponents' attacks, get ads on the air in critical markets, and continue traveling across the state connecting with voters. | | I know it means the world to Deb to have you on our team, and we are all so, so proud of the movement we are building together — thank you. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Dylan McArthur Campaign Manager Deb for New Mexico | | | | |

name: JB Pritzker
subject: We can’t take our eye off the ball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
It’s JB Pritzker, and I’m worried.
There’s a lot of talk about Democrats winning the Senate, but there is NO path to victory without New Hampshire, and Chris Pappas needs our support. **[Will you chip in to support his battleground Senate campaign today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260427_3.0DkqOt&refcode=em20260427-3&t=1&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)**
New Hampshire has _always_ been a purple state, and national Republicans see it as one of their BEST pick-up opportunities to cement their Senate majority for years to come. Democrats can’t take their eyes off the ball because **this is by no means a safe blue seat.**
We have a real shot at securing a Democratic Senate majority in November, but any path to victory runs through New Hampshire.
Our country’s next chapter could be determined by what happens in the Granite State this fall. That’s why I hope you’ll support Chris Pappas. He’s a proven fighter for working families, he’s taken on Big Pharma, and he’s fighting to make sure the government actually works for the people it serves.
The GOP knows that New Hampshire is their best shot to flip a blue seat. Donald Trump, corporate PACs, and the national GOP are already spending _big_ to make that happen. The only way we can beat them is with grassroots support — so I need you with me.
**[If you’re able, please chip in $5 or more to Chris Pappas right now. Winning in New Hampshire is the only path to a Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260427_3.0DkqOt&refcode=em20260427-3&t=2&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260427_3.0DkqOt&amount=5&refcode=em20260427-3&t=21&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)**
Thank you for taking action,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260427_3.0DkqOt&refcode=em20260427-3&t=22&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260427-3&t=23&refcode2=6358_582294_OkG0XD&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=6358%2E582294%2EOkG0XD)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: The Democrats
subject: $7 before our next deadline
body:
---
Derek, We’re reaching out to ask for $7. Here’s what we’ll use it for: $7 will help us train hundreds of organizers who will register more than **250,000 new Democratic voters** in key battleground states. $7 will give Democrats the resources to flip the House and the Senate and put a massive check on Trump’s agenda. $7 will allow us to scale up our organizing and outreach efforts to help elect down-ballot Democrats who will work overtime to protect their cities, districts, and states from Trump’s chaos and devastation. [**If this work matters to you, please chip in $7 to the DNC today. We will put your donation to work immediately to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, across the country — this November and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260427_6873_fr&refcode2=6873_22930333_FfOeR9&akid=6873%2E22930333%2EFfOeR9) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260427_6873_fr&refcode2=6873_22930333_FfOeR9&akid=6873%2E22930333%2EFfOeR9)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: We can't afford to fall short.
body:
Are you with us?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | Peter,
We have**less than****72 hours left**.
In just a few days, we are up against our critical April End-of-Month deadline.
And if we fall behind, **Rocky Mountain Voice may not be able to put out the strong reporting that challenges the fake news media** the way Colorado conservatives expect.
That’s the reality.
This month, we took on the fake news head-on. We exposed stories they didn’t want covered and challenged narratives they hoped would go unchallenged.
But that work doesn’t continue automatically.
It depends on supporters stepping up **today****.**

**[👉 Please act before midnight and support Rocky Mountain Voice.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

---
[RUSH A DONATION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
If we miss this goal, it directly impacts what we can publish, how fast we can respond, and how aggressively we can push back.

We’re counting on our most reliable supporters in this final stretch.
Thank you for standing with us. I truly appreciate all your support.
**Stay Loud.**

[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Heidi Ganahl

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: November can't be an afterthought.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The stakes this year are nothing short of dire. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130287073/617288315/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U3MWM4MC1hMjQyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrS2A_r4iCBWYoWlzqq_OtPie8tFK6eFUqiSiyn06Mc=&emci=e3664296-f33f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=73e71c80-a242-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

I ran for Congress because I believe healthcare is a human right, and as a doctor, I took an oath to do no harm. These values guide me every single day. And it's why last week, I questioned RFK Jr. on his backward policies.

I told RFK Jr. directly, _**to his face**_ , that he should resign or be fired.

I didn't do it for headlines. I spoke up because the decisions he's making, and the free rein this administration has given him, have real consequences.

I show up for our district, especially when those in power are making choices that hurt our kids, our seniors, and our communities.

We're already seeing what happens when the Trump administration puts reckless political games ahead of people. I'm going to keep speaking out, keep asking tough questions, and keep fighting back when it matters — which is always.

If we want to keep holding this administration accountable, we need a House majority that will do the same. We need a Democratic House that puts a check on this administration’s policies, puts people first, and does the work without hesitation. [**If you can, chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline to help me stay on track and keep this campaign going strong from now through November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130287074/617288316/-779404001?refcode=em26_260426_eom1_fndd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260426_eom1_fndd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=73e71c80-a242-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2U3MWM4MC1hMjQyLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrS2A_r4iCBWYoWlzqq_OtPie8tFK6eFUqiSiyn06Mc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130287075/617288317/-779404001?refcode=em26_260426_eom1_fndd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260426_eom1_fndd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=73e71c80-a242-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640

clean_body: The stakes this year are nothing short of dire. Peter, I ran for Congress because I believe healthcare is a human right, and as a doctor, I took an oath to do no harm. These values guide me every single day. And it's why last week, I questioned RFK Jr. on his backward policies. I told RFK Jr. directly, to his face , that he should resign or be fired. I didn't do it for headlines. I spoke up because the decisions he's making, and the free rein this administration has given him, have real consequences. I show up for our district, especially when those in power are making choices that hurt our kids, our seniors, and our communities. We're already seeing what happens when the Trump administration puts reckless political games ahead of people. I'm going to keep speaking out, keep asking tough questions, and keep fighting back when it matters — which is always. If we want to keep holding this administration accountable, we need a House majority that will do the same. We need a Democratic House that puts a check on this administration’s policies, puts people first, and does the work without hesitation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue clean_body: Rob Bonta spends all his time suing President Trump and protecting criminals. Next week is our chance to fire him and take back our state. Peter, Have you seen journalist James O'Keefe's undercover footage from Skid Row? He caught taxpayer-funded NGOs and political operatives on tape bribing homeless individuals with cash and drugs in exchange for voter registrations and ballot signatures. Newsom and Bonta are completely complicit. They refuse to enforce our election laws and have actively shut down investigations by County Sheriffs into substantial election irregularities. They are perfectly happy to let these crimes happen if it helps them maintain power. We will investigate these corrupt NGOs. We will prosecute election fraud. We will hold the political machine accountable, and we will make voters feel confident in our election system. I am ready to fight back, but I need the resources to take on Newsom, Bonta, and the Sacramento Machine. Will you pitch in today to help me build our war chest? Thank you, Michael Gates Republican for Attorney General | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MICHAEL GATES FOR ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID 1486227 3843 S Bristol St #604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: Katie Porter
subject: Even without my whiteboard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
This time we have to get our message in front of even more Californians once I’m offstage.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41229%2E3422442%2EbB2vId)
Peter,
**I’ll be back on stage for my second debate of this campaign tomorrow night.**
At the first debate, I laid out what I’m going to do for California: **free child care, eliminating state income tax for people making less than $100,000, and passing single-payer healthcare.**
Even without my whiteboard on stage, I held the other candidates accountable. I called out the Republicans' racism and lack of a plan to address housing, and how one of my opponents is a literal billionaire.
Tomorrow night, we’ll do it again—but this time we have to get our message in front of _even more Californians_ once I’m offstage.
My team is ready to reach voters wherever they are: at events across the state, on social media, and on TV. **I’m counting on Porter Supporters like you to help fund those efforts.**
**[Can you chip in $5 to make sure we’re fully ready to blast our message out to Californians everywhere once the debate is over?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260427_1_ak.9DVPCg&refcode=em20260427-41229&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41229%2E3422442%2EbB2vId)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260427_1_ak.9DVPCg&refcode=em20260427-41229&t=22&akid=41229%2E3422442%2EbB2vId)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260427-41229&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41229_3422442_bB2vId&akid=41229%2E3422442%2EbB2vId)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41229&t=24&akid=41229%2E3422442%2EbB2vId)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41229&t=25&akid=41229%2E3422442%2EbB2vId)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Supreme Court Corruption Alert via Fight For Reform
subject: Clarence Thomas is SHAKING in his boots (!!!!)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz) **[STUNNING: Amy Klobuchar and Hakeem Jeffries are teaming up to pass a BOMBSHELL new bill that would STOP Supreme Court corruption [!!!]](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=3&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz)** The _Supreme Court Ethics Act_ would END corruption in Trump's Supreme Court! [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=4&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz) **_[Please, we need 5O,OOO Good Democrats to sign our petition to help Hakeem Jeffries and Amy Klobuchar pass the _Supreme Court Ethics Act_ by 11:59 PM ->](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=5&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz)_** | [SIGN NOW: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE _SUPREME COURT ETHICS ACT_ >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=6&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz)
---
We need this bill passed right away. Remember:

❌Clarence Thomas has been caught _accepting illegal bribes._

❌Samuel Alito flew the same flags at his home that insurrectionists did on January 6th.

❌Trump's Justices _granted him total immunity_ for crimes committed as President.
**_[The _Supreme Court Ethics Act_ would end this madness!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=7&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz)_**
It would:

✅ _Ban_ Justices from accepting bribes.

✅ _Stop_ Justices from ruling on cases with conflicts of interest.

✅ _Establish_ oversight for corruption and misconduct on the bench!
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=8&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz)
**_[We need 50,000 signatures by 11:59 PM to stand with Amy Klobuchar and Hakeem Jeffries to demand Congress pass this bill. Add your name now ->](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=9&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz)_**
[SIGN NOW: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE _SUPREME COURT ETHICS ACT_ >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73818?t=10&akid=24174%2E4449941%2EMzBibz)
---
Team, we're relying on you to represent voters in your city on our petition.

We're short 2,730 signatures from your area, so we need you to sign immediately.

_Fight For Reform_

| **❌ DON’T SCROLL AWAY ❌
❌ DON’T DELETE THIS EMAIL ❌

Donald Trump wants to **ELIMINATE** the Postal Service — _your local Post Office could end up on the CHOPPING BLOCK!_

📫 **The USPS has been vital for rural and urban communities!
📫 Millions have been able to vote in elections through mail-in voting!!

| | Newsletter | Issue 1, Volume 1 | April 28, 2026
---
| | Ericka Kopp is running for Congress to bring you access and accountability through action. She is the strong, progressive advocate we need in DC to fight for people-first policies.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
### The difference a week can make.
---
| | Source: Democracy Docket
---
| [Visit Source](https://erickakopp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be2b03077b3c4d3385f5eaa6f&id=b0945d4fe0&e=1030105c7f)
---
| | | Last Tuesday, 4/21, Virginians voted yes to change the Congressional district maps. On the day after the election, a circuit court judge in Tazewell County, Virginia, blocked the vote. That judge ruled in favor of the RNC and prevented the certification of the election results. In fact, this marked the third time the same Tazewell County Circuit Judge challenged redistricting.

So we have a “no” from one circuit court.
Separately, the City of Richmond Circuit Court weighed in on the fairness of the redistricted maps and ruled against the RNC. They held that the General Assembly had the power to pass legislation creating the “10-1” map. The court declined to overturn the will of the voters.
Then we had a “yes” from another circuit court, effectively creating a circuit split.
Yesterday, April 27, the Virginia Supreme Court heard oral arguments from both sides on the amendment, and now all we can do is wait. Once the court has made a final decision, Ericka will release a statement to the press.
---

We plan to deliver our ballot petitions on May 8th.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: The White House responded to our hidden camera election fraud footage.
body:
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zntt876e0ks5732nqf7fh8cuc0339dnllbv10bu0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")

---
| Dear Patriot,
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth — **a real voter's identity.** “Sign his name,” the man said. “Just write what I tell you to write.”**[**We filmed the whole thing.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl25sl7ah7ea84dgb54peodjmori0hrrqdj38nlo_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs)

**[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za7ccr9h58dho2qnir25vo5ajrrkc00a012e25r0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs)What you're about to see is the most explosive hidden-camera footage my team has ever captured. Not speculation. Not anonymous sources.**Actual election crimes committed on camera — in broad daylight — on the streets of Los Angeles.** Over the course of several days, my undercover journalists documented petition circulators handing post-it notes with real voters' names and addresses to homeless individuals, paying them cash — one to three dollars per signature — and instructing them to forge those voters' signatures on official petitions and voter registration forms.We captured it **twenty-eight times.** That's twenty-eight documented instances in just a few days of filming. Which means across Los Angeles County, this is happening **tens of thousands of times.**[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt73pa6ijt1dikaonb77hkq7df04og0ndjd1hmho_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")****| [▶ WATCH THE HIDDEN-CAMERA FOOTAGE AND CHIP IN $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zprun11lp16smqng5deqg3ggmh7ve47lcuct3a80_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")
---
Let me walk you through what our cameras caught.
A voter named Vicky Walker. A voter named Paulson. A voter named Joseph Albright. Real people. Real identities. In each case, a petition coordinator handed a homeless person a sticky note bearing that voter's information and told them to sign as if they were that person.
One coordinator was caught on camera admitting they get paid seven to ten dollars per signature. They're turning around and paying homeless people a fraction of that — a dollar, sometimes three — to commit federal crimes on their behalf.
Let me be clear about what we're talking about: **it is a federal crime to provide false information on a voter registration form. It is a federal crime to offer payment for voter registration.** What we documented is not a gray area. It is multiple felonies, exposed on hidden camera, happening systematically.
The New York Times told America this doesn't happen. Their Sunday edition dismissed election fraud concerns. **We just proved them wrong twenty-eight times on tape.**
And here's what happened next: we brought our footage to the White House. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called it “astounding.” NBC News covered it. The story is breaking through.
**But investigations like this are not free.**
Every dollar you give goes directly to fieldwork: $35 covers a day of undercover equipment costs. $50 covers the background research we do to identify real voters whose identities are being stolen. $100 funds a full day of field operations. $250 helps cover the legal costs of protecting our journalists when powerful people try to shut us down.
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn173e9li9tg6nb79bg0gdcv1bt9vsa4iv57nkb0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")****
[▶ CHIP IN $50 TO KEEP OUR CAMERAS ROLLING](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5buhfg2tg0fr0d7b8gg1dagjk6adv5rdillrhe8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")
---
Think about what's at stake. If petition circulators can forge voter signatures by the tens of thousands in broad daylight — paying homeless people with cash and cigarettes to impersonate real voters — and the system does nothing about it, then your vote is being diluted. Your voice is being stolen.
The only reason we know about this is because my team was there with hidden cameras. **No one else was going to expose this.** Not the Times. Not local officials. Not the people getting paid seven dollars a signature to look the other way.
We did it. And we need your help to keep doing it.
Can I count on you today?
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbige08h9ddo3grcjk4q3gnnfikq6o6h7rm5i24g_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")****
[▶ YES — RUSH $100 TO FUND THE NEXT INVESTIGATION](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpi7gok3cdqeme42b2tiomet9dbdsgaup41er5tg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")
---

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** They said election fraud doesn't happen. We filmed it twenty-eight times in a matter of days — real voters' identities, forged by strangers for a dollar a signature. The White House has seen it. NBC has covered it. But the investigation isn't over. **Your gift of $35, $50, or $100 today puts our cameras back on the street tomorrow.**
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdt9al2fnosl15odul7juqnumcf9dikkta36hqdo_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")****
[Chip in right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5dhrgtphik9muqm633eubndknqvm5gkh3mlgi8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7cpjm0ob2c3h2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Ballroom Push, Lost Bible Pages, and Ikea Hotel
body:
Cole Allen, the 31-year-old suspected gunman in Saturday's White House Correspondents' Dinner attack, was charged Monday with [attempted assassination](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAURb8Gd0zwgTIuWDRp3E03TdOlQXgqDfIMMDPx75vpL3R9k5tzzvdtutkQQ1o_7I6mLjQlfJaItWKeZhtjJtqPe9kilTqHOeJhV5xAQM-F4nCdvA3xnFTjzYIIKBs0rdZaaqEH0WzGy8W1YlbOQgcw9MJZN6NG6ZXqEIcmmNebUHBthehhuGjwwi69s52aFwnIlEAfKuXLD4VUN1ziSQ_MF0d7E81W61GYfGMwMhjt7F4Gr43B-PXJYHxuoSLf6F6QO8oZy0HJY6qF-5ASZl42ohrSysu9HOgqtznbsCb0fKfk7clgLJXyyeQYPJPvrQTVimvfNdn44xliDKXXTIl1tyH-gdV_1XwY-A0AAP__JQ2LcQ) of President Trump after running past a Secret Service magnetometer with a 12-gauge shotgun and handgun.

## Dinner Attack Reignites Ballroom Push
Cole Allen, the 31-year-old suspected gunman in Saturday's White House Correspondents' Dinner attack, was charged Monday with [attempted assassination](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAURb8Gd0zwgTIuWDRp3E03TdOlQXgqDfIMMDPx75vpL3R9k5tzzvdtutkQQ1o_7I6mLjQlfJaItWKeZhtjJtqPe9kilTqHOeJhV5xAQM-F4nCdvA3xnFTjzYIIKBs0rdZaaqEH0WzGy8W1YlbOQgcw9MJZN6NG6ZXqEIcmmNebUHBthehhuGjwwi69s52aFwnIlEAfKuXLD4VUN1ziSQ_MF0d7E81W61GYfGMwMhjt7F4Gr43B-PXJYHxuoSLf6F6QO8oZy0HJY6qF-5ASZl42ohrSysu9HOgqtznbsCb0fKfk7clgLJXyyeQYPJPvrQTVimvfNdn44xliDKXXTIl1tyH-gdV_1XwY-A0AAP__JQ2LcQ) of President Trump after running past a Secret Service magnetometer with a 12-gauge shotgun and handgun. An investigation found that guests entered the Washington Hilton by flashing tickets without ID checks or scans, and Allen checked into his room the day before to bypass perimeter security entirely. [See the investigation here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu3CAURVeDOywMjPEUFEl-3EQ_XZTSepiHzQgDAjzWZPXRZAupr3R1zvn9uXyCDz5uP-FA3VxaIl41YGtYFgMhlJSOfNY9pNqMNwEzbLhwxkfKJOXTYsGH1yI7qx0iR9GhHpRSQjF1Z92uLYfRiBEmNRiYbnAH4yQq4VYwqzRT5_X7jUk-DYyN_N4rbhm4cYWbNE5wJJKh9S2V_pF8bDu68EpPLP2aji7ovbVcifhC-Ez4fF1Xf9XHeyN8Pit9-xA-t3IemdY9pebjRtdUCtacosXYKrU-Riy04noW314UBzkJwW5EzLUR8ZF__Pn2_RfhIxyZiK9HskR8uOCzSVBsV7TNlw_B11ERybYDfPhH1_4r6VPzvwEAAP___CuNGw). ## Musk vs. Altman: OpenAI Trial Begins
Jury selection began Monday in [Elon Musk's lawsuit](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GOkdm-DEpXGxDl223RGMzhtk7YASTRHn7K-4r3PL86Bzp-_cYH8jC2_wXV_Ka8rjR-xRSpWMMKHLkvO7Pc5F8auAgtONMI1jojG0M9OOELJ-xKSefiIDqknzlnKuddXdbLr5Fim3oUqQWGqwS2BBcn_qqQheQupL9tWYb6CtrO7jfHEwWUxexbUKqgYrG0sSaj9v_zJsulOSTX3TcYl5L8Yvqfhb1nwKGAgZdaGGRKytg2LNw_Fw2xWXLkudLtH1b2fZu1uf5ZV4GRVfczFUxyorbaRJGMjklw5uJ-XloAUN5-Gl_swifnSsaO6_IPz-l_grcy8N3AAAA__-DvoNy) against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, kicking off a four-week trial that could reshape the AI industry and OpenAI's planned IPO at a valuation near $1 trillion. Musk [co-founded OpenAI](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMiPTeLAJHFxCNpdeiBpoD75pbGR7Bs3fr1jtH2xUUpVUpXr_7tMdPfvw-Is72eLiFOjMTKVQmmZkTjHuxytvHHOZ_cx04IMmkNALqQSYaUXPn0nVq3VEQF1NttVad1rqQdabNYPrSXezW7A15ra6m5uNkaAMoVbO1d5ebVKBaaXsYWg0rBJdv-BNza4DqpSk1ZeYmv_Rh7KR4098U2qWuNdst1KOXHV_KhgrGM_zbMK8XC-uvIKx0LL9iLjsCkbiGMT-yk-RcRfIZccgIj4ZwypK8sgiLQE71Q7tUCe7Hqdn9rnXlZKPHT1_b5dfAXtb-AoAAP__kQKA7g) as a nonprofit in 2015 and donated about $38 million between 2016 and 2020, leaving the board in 2018 after other leaders rejected his pitch to fold the startup into Tesla. He's now seeking $134 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, plus the firing of Altman, claiming the company betrayed its founding mission to benefit humanity. OpenAI counters that the suit is a stunt to slow its progress and benefit Musk's rival firm xAI. The two billionaires have feuded publicly for years, with Altman recently calling [his chance to question Musk under oath](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb8GOiM_GzAULtK8btOmRAMeg7ODB-Fhyfv76EX5gy2vdHXv0fn1MX1AopTXn7Cjl8hTxrsQiuA5zUB0Mu_HVTbiInOaCQ9YcTLa9Eq3ygxTgESvqa2Dj4gGbY3-4ZyzTrtR15sPD7TRWmd7HUw320G3XRcGO5qoAca5Tv69plszPLTuzdg4EzTEfoGunaM1WLUaQxI-m9-csmwY6cVfeDYL7zX5TeQolf1RmWdlnvd9N5H_zFdJGUt5dyrzFFy2zMTr639QkgRyUUic1X6VT1VgV0CyQ1YbQlALX6coOROQer8pPjBDUvcGoj4z3_Xpw3EnolR6V7V63SHRPyb5lsgvb_4GAAD__2ugizY) "Christmas in April." Witnesses include Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella.
## 42 Lost New Testament Pages Recovered
University of Glasgow scholars have [recovered 42 lost pages](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuhDAQQNHTmG4tMxhsChdp6DZtSmswA3YyYATeRXv7aHOFXOBJ_3_d_R0Tp235xJVcmbPf6DqZSqHDj8h85LzujzNyPsuYRqYdF_KgoLspfQPrJ0z88rqa3EwE1FTkamNMY5TpVRVdH3Swxs5BByI7hr7TOmBrlTWaQttUyb01pcHWSnXQSwOTwrkL2OpxboCEVjSlkg_5ndNWIs38yk86ZMhrxS6Wsp-i-RAwCBiu65ILo8QgHz8ChneOgCESTpw28jV0DejW0yZjWbk63LRfiTmdnRFaLSsm_oPLv248HfwGAAD__zU8c4U) from Codex H, one of the most important early New Testament manuscripts. The sixth-century copy of the Letters of St. Paul was taken apart at Greece's [Great Lavra Monastery](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU9jOpAZvDZbuEhDt2lTIoOHZaIxRrYXtLePiJQTpP96T-9_PcaHI6bt-ekC2rLEccMzM5aCaZwcc4ox7K-8csxloolxd08cQYKupaqhH70jfo-q8nZBBOwqtK0xpjPS3GW1Wn9zd-hg9q0CvPU9Tlq3flbYT712nazIXjSpoG-l1HBvDHjpFj27m5qWDlAoiZ5KTM13pK2suPA7HpiaOYaK7VrKnkX3IWAQMJzn2QT0hIdjyiU3GxYBw6UQMEglYLhS6isj13_LOrjtledEe6kTzhcdvYChStbvJzFT1kYo-QyO-Ndb_nXWYeEnAAD__93Afu4) in the 13th century, with its pages reused as binding material in other books. Researchers used [multispectral imaging](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyqzAQRb9GdPLIiyxBoeI1dH5tSmZBK1Bm8TJCseO_z5BfSH_nnDn34z7eMXN-LP9xo1CTjA96HUy1UhknZC4i2_51rCxHnfLEtONCIxhw2lgN3Rgx83u0TQyJCKhtKFy99603vjfNGno3dZ2Nfd91AJNroY0O8Tonc0Mii00OJ81Y6K7GOOgvHqLB5Ga82Sm1QMoairlKuXxKftSVEr_lSeUyy9ZwWGvdD9X-UzAoGLDMK5KwLO8Nl3OiYDgFCgZjFQwW9Nmiz45DS9KzRPrWqy40n1SKCoamhLi_MnM-nFfWLBtm_vXVP530DPATAAD__zrdepc) to capture faint "ghost" text left as mirror impressions on facing pages, then confirmed the parchment's age with radiocarbon dating. The recovered pages include some of the earliest known chapter lists for Paul's Letters. View the [digital edition here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFy6yAQANDTSJ0ZvOJrpYLiN-6cNiWzgkUiWRkNYDu-fSa5Qi7wZt771V0pSbqtb7SzbTG7Gz-rcGtc3EIiJef9uNdNcm1LWoQPWtmBhvGkzQkmFyjJy5k-2MgMPPRsz4g4oMZZ95tFmhD9wIbjMjH7czR-nGdEmoNB4j7ZH00bmM5ajzArhKApjp7-mSUOwJ3RHFLLRX3kdGsbR3nlBxfl896L3Vo7ajf87-DSwcXnwF-botKqWoUUeXX_7ODSFxuOZxJJdcTO6HWnJL9C-1P7YeE7AAD__8aFbHo).

On this day in 1967, boxing champion Muhammad Ali into the U.S. Army during the Vietnam War, citing his religious beliefs. His draft-evasion conviction was overturned by the U.S. Supreme Court in 1971. Yesterday, we asked how well you know your mail carrier, and reader Dena sent in a gem. Eight years ago, she and her fiance missed a Saturday delivery of their wedding rings. Their carrier, Anna, left her personal phone number on the slip and met them in a parking lot to hand them over. The couple celebrates their eight anniversary in June. Congratulations! An investigation found that guests entered the Washington Hilton by flashing tickets without ID checks or scans, and Allen checked into his room the day before to bypass perimeter security entirely. . The breach has renewed Trump's push for a $400 million White House ballroom. The Justice Department asked the National Trust for Historic Preservation to drop its lawsuit blocking construction, . Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., to back the ballroom, saying the Hilton "wasn't built to accommodate an event with the line of succession for the U.S. government." Musk vs. Altman: OpenAI Trial Begins Jury selection began Monday in against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, kicking off a four-week trial that could reshape the AI industry and OpenAI's planned IPO at a valuation near $1 trillion. Musk as a nonprofit in 2015 and donated about $38 million between 2016 and 2020, leaving the board in 2018 after other leaders rejected his pitch to fold the startup into Tesla. He's now seeking $134 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, plus the firing of Altman, claiming the company betrayed its founding mission to benefit humanity. OpenAI counters that the suit is a stunt to slow its progress and benefit Musk's rival firm xAI. The two billionaires have feuded publicly for years, with Altman recently calling "Christmas in April." Witnesses include Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella. 42 Lost New Testament Pages Recovered University of Glasgow scholars have from Codex H, one of the most important early New Testament manuscripts. The sixth-century copy of the Letters of St. Paul was taken apart at Greece's in the 13th century, with its pages reused as binding material in other books. Researchers used to capture faint "ghost" text left as mirror impressions on facing pages, then confirmed the parchment's age with radiocarbon dating. The recovered pages include some of the earliest known chapter lists for Paul's Letters. View the .
