name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2PMgkXyCFGkpqqyoOrKMmYgVsGOMPB-v6Lq-4DuRkdnRpp7fz7Mw_rJh_G7nbFyuzdLMt3iw_j5ihOmOOOMKdnRh7GzBhgoyiQFfXiQ9ZXrlYAMK14UhSi4kDJ7VbkrSy6Z1QMvhRxUV3ZcS2EVAGfFoDJfHZeYBM0Zz6U4DblmvcJ80Nx2Qjki2fbu7Yrp5GJIuOx29Tv6EOIxxXBycc6m6rWu70TEmUBDoEnotgVPNmAf18Mg0HSL3ZF2Mf5OBBooeA4ONO1zVFR2UlLNlaaYd4VSWAy65EQ02zqbFLfFIRH1pb7R57UloA48Y--3mYj6-vhHnJ3f1o-BiBoY5ExyZi71zVye5_Zq7rfbL8i_mee1NT_O9KO9f63FsGJYiag_2jv9yiNbqv796afJJ1UQycbZ-unvs-v_17NX8CcAAP__EQiXbg)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2PMgkXyCFGkpqqyoOrKMmYgVsGOMPB-v6Lq-4DuRkdnRpp7fz7Mw_rJh_G7nbFyuzdLMt3iw_j5ihOmOOOMKdnRh7GzBhgoyiQFfXiQ9ZXrlYAMK14UhSi4kDJ7VbkrSy6Z1QMvhRxUV3ZcS2EVAGfFoDJfHZeYBM0Zz6U4DblmvcJ80Nx2Qjki2fbu7Yrp5GJIuOx29Tv6EOIxxXBycc6m6rWu70TEmUBDoEnotgVPNmAf18Mg0HSL3ZF2Mf5OBBooeA4ONO1zVFR2UlLNlaaYd4VSWAy65EQ02zqbFLfFIRH1pb7R57UloA48Y--3mYj6-vhHnJ3f1o-BiBoY5ExyZi71zVye5_Zq7rfbL8i_mee1NT_O9KO9f63FsGJYiag_2jv9yiNbqv796afJJ1UQycbZ-unvs-v_17NX8CcAAP__EQiXbg)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGumzAQRb_G7BzZY2PMgkXyCFGkpqqyoOrKMmYgVsGOMPB-v6Lq-4DuRkdnRpp7fz7Mw_rJh_G7nbFyuzdLMt3iw_j5ihOmOOOMKdnRh7GzBhgoyiQFfXiQ9ZXrlYAMK14UhSi4kDJ7VbkrSy6Z1QMvhRxUV3ZcS2EVAGfFoDJfHZeYBM0Zz6U4DblmvcJ80Nx2Qjki2fbu7Yrp5GJIuOx29Tv6EOIxxXBycc6m6rWu70TEmUBDoEnotgVPNmAf18Mg0HSL3ZF2Mf5OBBooeA4ONO1zVFR2UlLNlaaYd4VSWAy65EQ02zqbFLfFIRH1pb7R57UloA48Y--3mYj6-vhHnJ3f1o-BiBoY5ExyZi71zVye5_Zq7rfbL8i_mee1NT_O9KO9f63FsGJYiag_2jv9yiNbqv796afJJ1UQycbZ-unvs-v_17NX8CcAAP__EQiXbg) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere.
